hook.summary: A hand unscrews colorful screws from a 3D gingerbread house to match color-coded slots.
hook.visual_action: A finger taps on screws of various colors, which then fly into matching containers at the top of the screen.

scene_flow: Hand unscrews green and red screws from a festive gingerbread house.
Gameplay continues with blue and yellow screws as the 'Big Brain' text appears.
The house is cleared of screws, triggering a 'Nice' message and celebratory effects.
End card displays the game title 'SCREWDOM 3D' and a 'Play Now' button.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle gamers who enjoy satisfying mechanics and brain-teasing challenges.
